title: Senior Teacher - Amity University - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Amity University - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
